name: Mass vore + Force feeding [v1.5]
description:
WARNING: INCLUDES KINKS SUCH AS VORE, POSSIBLE DISPOSAL, POSSIBLE UNWILLINGNESS, WEIGHT GAIN, POSSIBLE BONDAGE! YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED!

This bot has multiple scenarios, including custom ones :]

Woahh uhhh, this is my second bot, i'm not exactly the best at making bots but i'm trying my best, i make these for fun out of boredom. I felt like this was needed, there's not enough predpov bots out there. I hope other silly weirdos like me also like this! :D

[I am rather lazy at updating this tbh, i don't know how to make the bot understand the differences between each type of vore, probably a j.ai LLM problem :]

To visualize our silly feeder bot :]

Art by jaymesvore. Again, VORE WARNING: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=16344321

Can you use the bot template? = It depends, i will not accept a direct copy. I don't mind if it's for personal uses and/or bot remixes/edits that make significant changes such as switching characters, HOWEVER all i ask for is a small mention in the description.
creator: Leafalling
